content:
{
  "triage":         "Suspicious",
  "confidence":     0.75,
  "recommendation": "Monitor",
  "affected_system": "WORKSTATION-014, WORKSTATION-015, WORKSTATION-016",
  "rationale":      "The alert indicates suspected file encryption activity on three workstations. While the threat intel hash match is only a partial match, it could still indicate an active ransomware attack. However, sensor degradation reduces certainty and isolation of all three hosts would disrupt ~60 users currently active on those machines. Therefore, it is recommended to monitor the situation closely and take further action if necessary."
}

DECISION: Monitor
RULE\_APPLIED: None
GUARDRAIL\_TRIGGERED: False
PLANNER\_APPROVED: None
RATIONALE: The alert indicates suspected file encryption activity on three workstations. While the threat intel hash match is only a partial match, it could still indicate an active ransomware attack. However, sensor degradation reduces certainty and isolation of all three hosts would disrupt ~60 users currently active on those machines. Therefore, it is recommended to monitor the situation closely and take further action if necessary.

ACTION_TAKEN: Monitor
OUTCOME: Executed
TIMESTAMP: 2026-06-22T21:05:27.803111+00:00
NOTE: Action authorised and executed.
